feedback.text: Google trying to block sideloading is against the idea of android itself. We were advertised a open platform that they are trying to lockdown. We paid a ton of money for the hardware, we should be able to do what we want with it. It's not something they should be able to control and lockdown. If I wanted a phone like that, I would've bought an iPhone, but I bought a phone that would let me have freedom to do what I wanted and google is trying to take that away so they can make more money.
